nasb.text: It shall be that the city which is nearest to the slain man, that is, the elders of that city, shall take a heifer of the herd, which has not been worked and which has not pulled in a yoke;

esv.text: And the elders of the city that is nearest to the slain man shall take a heifer that has never been worked and that has not pulled in a yoke.

cnv.text: 看看哪一座城離那被殺的人最近，那城的長老就要從牛群中取一隻母牛犢，就是還沒有耕過地、沒有負過軛的。

ccb.text: 距离尸体最近的那城的长老们要牵一头从未负过轭、从未耕过地的小母牛，
